/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/asciiclock.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asciiclock.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asciiclock.dir/src/shapes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asciiclock.dir/src/clock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asciiclock.dir/src/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asciiclock.dir/src/surface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asciiclock.dir/src/interface.cpp.o -o asciiclock  -lncursesw -lpanel -lmenu
